name: Canada
style_of_play: Direct attacking football built around pace, vertical runs, and aggressive counter-pressing.
weaknesses: squad depth compared to elite nations
can be stretched by possession-heavy teams
tactical_summary: Win the ball and immediately look forward to Davies and David in space; compact 4-4-2 without possession with fullbacks tucking in to protect central areas.
why_it_matters: Canada's rise combined with home support makes them a dangerous underdog capable of upsetting higher-ranked opponents.
